title: River Pollution by Source: What Contributes the Most?
caption: In a typical major Indian river basin, everyday domestic sewage is the overwhelming majority of pollution by volume. Plastics and industrial waste, while visible, are a much smaller fraction.

items.description: Untreated wastewater from homes, apartments, and cities—the largest volume by far.
Liquid waste from factories, tanneries, and chemical plants.
Fertilizers, pesticides, and animal waste washing off fields during rains.
Plastic bags, bottles, and other macroscopic trash that floats on the surface.
